candidates.title: Polish Ebook in Polish ;) Word or InDesign, cover, images and final PDF
candidates.tools: InDesign — for print-ready CMYK output and multi-page layout
candidates.brief: I’m looking for a detail-oriented layout designer to turn a finished Polish manuscript into a polished, publication-ready PDF ebook. The source file is a pre-formatted Word document of around 60 pages. The text has already been proofread, but the layout still needs professional attention: typography, spacing, image placement, visual consistency, page flow and final PDF export. You’ll work from my existing Word template, brand/style references and example images. The ebook should be prepared in A4 format and delivered as a final PDF plus the editable source file. ## Scope of work You will be responsible for: * laying out the full ebook based on the supplied Word document * reviewing and cleaning up Word styles where needed * removing unnecessary manual spacing, extra paragraph breaks and inconsistent formatting * fixing typography issues, including widows, orphans and awkward page breaks

candidates.title: Book layout for spiritual author
candidates.brief: Upwork · Fixed price I need highly experienced, skilled person to layout my new book Avatar Quantum Healer for printing. It is now about 165 pages in Microsoft Word manuscript format, and final book will be 7" x 9" size. This job includes the following: Layout out paperback version of book to be print ready for KDP or other printers Creating e-book version of book Creating index for back of book. also: • Proper interior formatting for print & digital versions • Print-ready PDF preparation • IngramSpark/KDP publishing setup • File checks to avoid publishing errors • Assistance with book details, categories, and final upload process If you wish to apply let me know how soon you are available to do this, and about how long it will take to complete project after start date. Here is Amazon link for my previous book: https://www.amazon.com/Awakening-Avatar-Within-Superpowers-Humanity/dp/057825

candidates.title: KDP Formatter Needed for 32-Page Children's Picture Book — Paperback
candidates.brief: Upwork · Fixed price I have a completed manuscript and illustrations for a 32-page children's picture book and need a professional formatter to prepare paperback print-ready files for Amazon KDP. What I need: Interior layout formatted to 8.5×11 trim size Bleed, margins, and resolution set to KDP specifications Full wraparound cover file with correct spine width Print-ready PDF for KDP You should know: KDP template requirements How to calculate spine width based on page count How to export files that pass KDP's preflight check first time What will be provided: KDP Cover Template 32 Interior Pages PDF Looking for someone who can deliver clean files without back-and-forth revisions. Please share samples of previous KDP formatting work. Open the Upwork search this task was found in

candidates.title: Luxury Perfume E-Commerce Website
candidates.tools: InDesign · Illustrator — for scalable vector artwork and multi-page layout
candidates.brief: I need a web designer and developer to create a luxury e-commerce website for Luxeris, a premium fragrance brand. The visual identity, logo and packaging concepts are already defined, and we are looking for a modern, high-converting website that reflects elegance, exclusivity and sophistication. Scope: • Design and develop a premium homepage with refined typography, clean layouts and smooth animations. • Build a complete online store optimized for desktop and mobile devices. • Create a seamless customer journey from product discovery to checkout. Required features: • Product reviews. • Advanced filtering system. • Gift options and premium wrapping. • Secure online payments. • Order tracking. • Discount code functionality. • User accounts and wishlist. • Email newsletter integration. We will provide branding assets, product information and content. The final website should be fully respon
